ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pipes" (
  "pipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipe */,
  "nps" TEXT /* Nominal pipe size (NPS) */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used for the pipe */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the pipe schedule (e.g., STD, XS, 40, 40S) */,
  "od" REAL /* Outer diameter (OD) of the pipe */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the pipe */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the pipe was manufactured */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the pipe */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the pipe */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the pipe */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date of the pipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material (e.g., stainless steel, iron, steel) */,
  "material_density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "material_strength" REAL /* Strength of the material */,
  "material_cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_pipes" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "pipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipe assigned to the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the pipe assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the pipe was assigned to the project */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the pipe was installed */,
  "installation_status" TEXT /* Installation status (e.g., not installed, partially installed, fully installed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_pipes_pipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipe_id") REFERENCES pipes ("pipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_pipes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "pipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipe */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the pipe in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the pipe is stored */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* Last date when the inventory was checked */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the pipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_pipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipe_id") REFERENCES pipes ("pipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., inches, feet) */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., inches to meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipe_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension entry */,
  "pipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipe */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit used for the dimension */,
  "od" REAL /* Outer diameter (OD) of the pipe in the given unit */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the pipe in the given unit */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the pipe in the given unit */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the pipe in the given unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipe_dimensions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipe_dimensions_pipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipe_id") REFERENCES pipes ("pipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pipe data */,
  "pipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipe being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pipe data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipe_id") REFERENCES pipes ("pipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
